title: Port forwarding issue for n8n with SSL
symptom: The user was unable to bind n8n to Telegram due to SSL certificate issues. The service only worked after configuring the router to forward port 80.
not_this_if: All necessary ports are already forwarded
root_cause: n8n requires both ports 80 and 443 to be properly configured for SSL certificate generation. If only port 443 is open, the service cannot obtain the necessary certificates, leading to binding issues.
fix_steps: Forward port 80 to your n8n instance
Restart the n8n service to apply changes
agent_instruction: Ensure that port 80 is forwarded to your n8n instance for SSL certificate generation.
